summary: Comprehensive testing of BC Sales Shipment Capture feature (iteration_81). Backend: All 18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Record Shipment button on Demand tab, dialog with SO loading, commitment summary, line details, BC fields, and shipment history. POST /api/inventory-ledger/sales-orders/{id}/bc-shipment releases committed inventory via release_order_commitments pipeline. GET summary and shipment-log endpoints working.
passed_tests: Backend: POST bc-shipment returns 404 for nonexistent SO
Backend: GET summary returns 404 for nonexistent SO
Backend: GET summary for existing SO (SO-107040) returns commitment info with lines
Backend: GET summary for fully released SO (SO-TEST) works
Backend: Over-shipment (shipped > outstanding) returns 422
Backend: Idempotent - shipment on fully released SO returns skipped, not error
Backend: GET shipment-log returns entries for SO with shipments
Backend: GET shipment-log returns empty for SO with no shipments
Backend: Partial shipment releases only shipped qty, leaves remaining
Backend: Shipment creates order_release movement (movement_id returned)
Backend: Shipment log stores bc_shipment_number, bc_document_id, shipment_notes, shipped_lines
Backend REGRESSION: BC receipt capture still works
Backend REGRESSION: BC response capture still works
Backend REGRESSION: PO draft workflow still works
Backend REGRESSION: Inventory balances still work
Backend: Summary lines include committed_qty, released_qty, remaining_committed_qty
Backend: Summary includes latest_bc_shipment_number and latest_bc_shipped_at
Backend: Summary totals aggregate correctly across lines
Frontend: Record Shipment button visible on Demand tab toolbar
Frontend: Shipment dialog opens with SO ID input and Load button
Frontend: After loading SO, shows commitment summary (Committed/Released/Remaining/Last shipment)
Frontend: Line-level details table with Item, Committed, Released, Remaining, Ship Qty
Frontend: Ship Qty inputs available for lines with remaining commitment
Frontend: BC Shipment # field available
Frontend: BC Document ID field available
Frontend: Shipment Notes field available
Frontend: Record Shipment button (green) submits form
Frontend: Shipment History section shows previous shipments
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2315-2429: POST /sales-orders/{id}/bc-shipment correctly aggregates net committed per item from raw movements (commitments - releases), validates over-shipment (422), uses release_order_commitments pipeline for inventory release
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2404-2418: Shipment log entry correctly stores shipment_id, bc_shipment_number, bc_document_id, shipped_at, shipment_notes, shipped_lines
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2432-2440: GET shipment-log returns reverse chronological entries from bc_shipment_logs collection
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2443-2507: GET summary aggregates commitment and release movements, calculates remaining_committed_qty per line, includes latest shipment info
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 240-242: Record Shipment button on Demand tab with data-testid='inv-record-shipment-btn'
Frontend ShipmentCaptureDialog Lines 727-932: Dialog component with SO lookup, summary display, line-level ship qty inputs, BC fields, shipment history section
seed_data_used: SO-107040 (SPAM-12OZ with 200 committed, 7 released, 193 remaining). Previous shipments visible in history: SHP-FABBBBBB (SHP-BC-FIELDS-TEST), SHP-23512642 (SHP-RELEASE-TEST), SHP-52BAS98A (SHP-PARTIAL-5). Hormel Foods workspace (HORMEL).
context_for_next_testing_agent: BC Sales Shipment Capture feature fully tested. POST /api/inventory-ledger/sales-orders/{id}/bc-shipment releases committed inventory via release_order_commitments. Key behaviors: 1) 404 if no commitments found, 2) 422 if over-shipment, 3) Idempotent (returns skipped for fully released), 4) Creates order_release movements with movement_id. GET summary returns lines with committed/released/remaining and latest shipment info. GET shipment-log returns reverse chronological entries. Frontend dialog on Demand tab shows SO lookup, commitment summary, line details, BC fields, and shipment history. SO-107040 has 193 remaining on SPAM-12OZ for testing additional shipments.

error_codes.404: No order commitments found for sales order
